creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I stumbled across <https://github.com/freebsd/chromium> through curiosity, after seeing <https://people.freebsd.org/~yuri/freebsd-github-stars-2023-01-05.html>. 

<https://github.com/freebsd/chromium/blob/master/README.md> begins: 

> freebsd-chromium
> 
> This repository contains the FreeBSD Chromium port. …

Please make users of the www/chromium port aware of this repo for the port. 

Maybe not as a WWW. The package description might be ideal. 

Thanks
